batch: Batch147 — Real Hosted Proof Run Closure Kit
phase: P0 hosted/public proof execution closure support after Batch146 runner hardening
selectedBecause: Batch146 made the hosted proof runner auditable, but the project still needs a deterministic way to review the downloaded GitHub Actions artifact bundle and decide whether hosted proof is actually closed without guessing from screenshots or partial logs.
scope: Add a closure dossier script that can review either the current repo artifacts or a downloaded/extracted GitHub Actions artifact folder.
Validate preflight, runner, CI report, execution gate, visual evidence, screenshot PNGs, public rollout report, and secret-leak red flags as separate gates.
Add strict mode for final closure review while keeping local/source smoke non-failing for honest blocked-state reporting.
Add a runbook for the exact Vercel/GitHub Actions hosted proof procedure and the Android/desktop artifact review path.
Keep source/local readiness separate from hosted/public/production claims.

hardGates.label: Strict preflight proves Node24 + GitHub Actions + HTTPS hosted APP_URL
Hosted CI final proof runner completed in strict mode with zero failed steps
Runtime P0 hosted CI report accepts all required evidence contracts
Final hosted proof summary marks hostedProofClosed=true
Real visual smoke evidence has required viewport passes and PNG screenshots
Public rollout readiness remains a separate gate after hosted proof

allowed: Batch147 adds a stronger artifact-review and go/no-go closure kit for real hosted proof runs.
Local/source smoke can produce a blocked dossier that explains exactly what evidence is missing.
Strict closure can only pass after a real GitHub Actions Node24 run with APP_URL and visual PNG artifacts.
blocked: Không nói hosted proof closed nếu closure dossier strict chưa pass với artifact thật.
Không nói public rollout allowed nếu public-rollout readiness chưa pass và chưa review production DB/security/legal.
Không dùng local Node22/loopback/dry-run để thay cho hosted proof thật.
